description: Load the earthquake data from /home/ga/gvsig_data/earthquakes/usgs_earthquakes_2024jan.csv into the 'countries_base' project in gvSIG Desktop. Create a spatial point layer from this table using the 'longitude' and 'latitude' fields with the EPSG:4326 coordinate system. Export the resulting layer as a shapefile to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/earthquakes.shp.
